name: escrow-deployer
description: Compiles and deploys the escrow contract on Pharos (or reuses an existing one) and creates an on-chain split group, emitting the SplitCreated event. Supports native PHRS and ERC-20 (USDC).

inputs.tokenAddress: string (optional) — ERC-20 token address (USDC); ignored in native mode
inputs.transfers: array of { fromAddress, toAddress, amountWei } — on-chain debts
inputs.native: boolean (optional) — true to use the native PHRS contract

outputs.abi: array — contract ABI for the other skills
